name: claude-launch-runtime-id
description: #47 D2/D3 mode (b): a Claude Code PostToolUse:Task launch payload yields a `dispatched` record whose subject is the runtime's own stable pairing id (tool_response.agentId) with subject_basis=runtime-id disclosed. Provenance: DESIGN-MANDATED - the landed producer already writes subject=agentId (OBSERVED, scripts/tests/fixtures/payloads/launch-car.json) but does NOT yet write subject_basis; this vector pins the disclosed-basis field #47 adds and lands red-first with the D4 seam. Claude launch shape OBSERVED from scripts/tests/fixtures/payloads/launch-car.json.
